name: code-review
description: AI-Powered PR Review Platform — root orchestrator

scripts.dev: concurrently -n API,WEB -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:web"
scripts.dev:ngrok: concurrently -n API,WEB -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev:api:ngrok" "npm run dev:web"
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd api && bun install && cd ../web && npm install
